claim_boundary: Subset runtime/evidence expansion only; not a full locked public-raster metric claim.
interpretation: Remote subset execution is stable and fast enough for expanded evaluation.
The selected balanced_f1 operating point keeps candidate inflation under the baseline threshold.
Center recall and tiny IoU recall still fail the configured scaled Faster R-CNN baselines, so this subset does not justify full-run quality claims.
Typed accuracy on IoU matches is high, so localization/coverage remains a stronger bottleneck than type classification on matched boxes.
next_recommendation: Do not launch full locked as a quality claim yet; first run P117 subset failure attribution or compare selected thresholds/policies on the subset outputs.
